nasb.text: ‘Also if one of the animals dies which you have for food, the one who touches its carcass becomes unclean until evening.

esv.text: “And if any animal which you may eat dies, whoever touches its carcass shall be unclean until the evening,

cnv.text: “一隻你們可以吃的走獸死了，誰摸了牠的屍體，就不潔淨到晚上；

ccb.text: “一只可以食用的动物死后，任何人如果碰到它的尸体，都不洁净，要等到傍晚才能洁净。
